title: gate_bypass autopilot levels (off/normal/full/total) + loud surfacing
action: Add bypassLevel/BYPASS_LEVELS/bypassBanner to state.mjs; normalize gate_bypass into off/normal/full/total; surface active level loudly in status + preamble; extend bee-bypass-gate skill and docs; mirror templates/lib to .bee/bin/lib; keep verify green; set repo gate_bypass to total.

truths: bypassLevel(root) normalizes gate_bypass: false/absent->off, true/on/normal->normal, full->full, total->total
status.gate_bypass stays a boolean (=== level!=off) so existing readConfig tests pass; status.gate_bypass_level carries the level string
bee status text and session preamble print a loud level-specific GATE BYPASS banner for normal/full/total
templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib stay byte-identical (test_lib_mirror green); full verify chain exits 0
bee-bypass-gate skill accepts off/on/full/total and states each level's safety floor; routing-contract + AGENTS block describe the levels
prohibitions: do not break readConfig gate_bypass passthrough tests
do not let templates/lib drift from .bee/bin/lib

trace.outcome: gate_bypass is now a level (off/normal/full/total); full/total lift the high-risk floor; total = zero stops. Loud level banner in status + preamble; skill + routing-contract + AGENTS block + AGENTS.md describe levels; lib mirrored; repo set to total; full verify + release manifest green.
trace.verify_output: EXIT=0; test_lib: 297 passed 0 failed; test_hook_contracts: 121 passed 0 failed; test_lib_mirror: templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib byte-identical (15 files); test_release_tuple: all 4 components agree on 0.1.44; release_manifest --check: 32 file(s) match. Regenerated bee-bypass-gate/agents/openai.yaml projection (render --check clean).
trace.verify_command: full 10-suite verify chain (test_lib, test_onboard_bee, test_portable_paths, test_model_guard, test_write_guard, test_hook_contracts, test_bee_cli, test_verify_manifest, test_release_tuple, test_lib_mirror)
